__fixture__.name: managed_policy_stale_past_grace
__fixture__.scenario: Managed policy-bundle distribution is past its mirror-freshness grace. The bundle carries last-known-good linkage and a downgrade-safety posture that keeps local-core capabilities available without granting the stale bundle new managed narrowing authority. Distribution rows name mirrored_stale_past_grace honestly rather than pretending to be authoritative_live.
contract_sections: Policy-bundle row anatomy / Downgrade-safety and local-only-lane posture

signer_identity.signing_scope_note: Customer-operated trust root. Continuity verified on the mirror at the last successful refresh.

scope_selector.selector_note: Tenant-scoped bundle for the acme_prod org, applied across managed desktop install-profile cards.

narrowing_rules.rule_note: Restricts install to publishers verified by the customer trust root.
Narrows network egress to the customer-approved allowlist for managed surfaces.
Names the customer's redaction profile for support exports produced in managed mode.

distribution_statuses.note: Mirror last synced 2026-04-20; freshness grace expired at 2026-04-22. The bundle is readable but cannot authorise new managed narrowing.

last_known_good_linkage.fallback_posture_note: Client falls back to the last-known-good narrowing already applied; no new narrowing is introduced from the stale bundle. Local-core capabilities stay on ADR-0001 defaults.

review_schedule.grace_window_note: Between 2026-04-22 and 2026-04-25 the bundle is readable but stale; after 2026-04-25 it expires and the client falls back to the last-known-good narrowing.

local_only_lane_note: Under a local-only lane the stale bundle remains inspectable and never introduces new managed narrowing; desktop-core capabilities stay on ADR-0001 defaults.

locally_inspectable_fields: Bundle version, epoch, signer authority, and continuity state.
Distribution freshness class and validation state.
Last-known-good linkage that names the epoch and version the client falls back to.
explainability_envelope.explainability_note: A local admin can explain the narrowing decision from the bundle itself; no vendor console is required.
